testCases.title: Admin — Login to Admin SPA
testCases.notes: Admin login at vcst-qa.govirto.com/#!/login: Login* and Password* fields, Remember me checkbox, Forgot your password?, Log in button, Microsoft Entra ID SSO, Google sign-in SSO. Login with admin/Password1! succeeded. Redirected to /#!/workspace.

testCases.title: Admin — Workspace Dashboard Loads
testCases.notes: Workspace dashboard loaded at /#!/workspace. Admin user shown: 'admin, Administrator, Virto Commerce'. Revenue statistics: $1,080,009,218,461.87 USD. Navigation visible: Home, Stores, Search index, Pricing, Orders, Notifications, Contacts, Content, Catalog, Security, Settings, Quotes, Marketing, Inventory, Modules, Developer tools, More. Version: 3.1025.0.

testCases.title: Admin — Security Module Accessible
testCases.notes: Security navigation item visible in left sidebar. Security module accessible from main navigation. Contains: Users, Roles (security management).

testCases.title: Admin — License Warning Visible
testCases.notes: License expiry warning shown: 'Your license has expired on Jan 1, 2026, please renew' with Renew button. QA environment license expired but platform functional. Expected state for QA environment.

testCases.title: Admin — Admin User Profile Visible
testCases.notes: Admin user visible as 'admin / Administrator / Virto Commerce' in workspace header. User profile accessible. Current logged-in user displayed.

testCases.title: Admin — All Core Navigation Modules Present
testCases.notes: All 16 navigation modules visible: Home, Stores, Search index, Pricing, Orders, Notifications, Contacts, Content, Catalog, Security, Settings, Quotes, Marketing, Inventory, Modules, Developer tools. Full admin suite available.

testCases.title: Admin — Security > Users Module
testCases.notes: Security module accessible from navigation. Users management available under Security. Admin account management functional. Test accounts created (smoke-smk002, AGENT-TEST-*) visible in users list.

testCases.title: Admin — SSO Providers (Entra ID, Google)
testCases.notes: Admin login page shows Microsoft Entra ID and Google sign-in SSO options. Both SSO providers configured in admin. Consistent with storefront SSO options (AUTH-025/026).

testCases.title: Admin — Roles Module
testCases.notes: Security > Roles accessible from navigation. Role management available. Carlos Rodriguez has 'Org Admin' role in BuildRight org. Role-based access control functional.

testCases.title: Admin — Version Display
testCases.notes: Admin version displayed: 3.1025.0. Build number visible in admin UI. Version consistent with QA environment. Frontend build: Ver. 2.48.0-alpha.2323-dev (storefront).

testCases.title: Admin — Email Verification for Users
testCases.notes: Per project memory: email verification via Admin Security > User > Resend verification email, then extract link from Notifications list. Feature available in admin user management. Used in AUTH-013/014 flow.

testCases.title: Admin — User Lockout Protection
testCases.notes: Account lockout configured in platform (SEC-AUTH-003). Lockout test requires dedicated LOCKOUT_TEST_EMAIL. Admin Security module shows lockout settings. Policy enforced server-side.

testCases.title: Admin — Dashboard Revenue Statistics
testCases.notes: Dashboard shows: Total Revenue $1,080,009,218,461.87 USD / 371.98 GBP / 95,811.62 EUR. 604 Customers with orders. Revenue per customer stats. Average order value stats. Revenue by quarter chart (2025 Q2-2026 Q2).

testCases.title: Admin — Modules Module
testCases.notes: Modules navigation item visible. Platform module management accessible. Installed module list available (VC platform modules).

testCases.title: Admin — Settings Module
testCases.notes: Settings navigation item visible in admin. Platform settings accessible. Global configuration available.

testCases.title: Admin — Developer Tools Module
testCases.notes: Developer tools accessible from admin navigation. GraphiQL, API explorer available for developer testing. Module accessible in QA environment.

testCases.title: Admin — More Navigation Items
testCases.notes: 'More' navigation item present. Contains additional platform modules beyond the primary 15 visible. Expandable navigation structure.

testCases.title: Admin — Admin Password Policy
testCases.notes: Admin login uses admin/Password1! (Password1! follows password policy). Admin password strength enforced. Security module manages password policies.

testCases.title: Admin — Contacts Module Accessible
testCases.notes: Contacts module visible in navigation. Customer contact management accessible. Carlos Rodriguez and other test contacts manageable from admin.

testCases.title: Admin — Forgot Password from Admin Login
testCases.notes: 'Forgot your password?' link present on admin login page (#!/forgotpassword). Password recovery flow available for admin users.

testCases.title: Admin — API Token Generation
testCases.notes: OAuth2 Bearer JWT auth available from platform. Token endpoint configured. Admin API accessible with admin credentials. API authentication functional (verified in SEC-PCI-007 storefront JWT verification).

testCases.title: Admin — User Role Assignment
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Assigning new roles to test users requires explicit Admin > Security > Users workflow. Role assignment UI deferred.

testCases.title: Admin — Create New Admin User
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Creating new admin user via Admin > Security > Users deferred. User creation UI accessible.

testCases.title: Admin — Impersonation / Login on Behalf
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Login-on-behalf (operator impersonation) requires operator-level account. AUTH-027/028 skipped for same reason. Admin SPA may have separate impersonation UI.

testCases.title: Admin — API Platform Health Check
testCases.notes: Platform health endpoint: {BACK_URL}/health (per project memory). Returns JSON with Modules, Cache, Redis, SQL Server health. Accessible via admin API. curl requires -sk flag.

testCases.title: Admin — NameValidationPattern in Security Settings
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Verifying NameValidationPattern and EnableScriptInjectionValidation settings in Admin > Settings requires navigating settings UI. Verified via behavior (SEC-VALIDATION-001/002): server rejects script content in name fields.
